message:
fix(core): add WAL_METRICS_MUTEX to isolate checkpoint advisor tests

Three checkpoint/advisor tests share GLOBAL_WAL_METRICS state and can
interfere with each other when run in parallel by the Rust test
harness. Add a static WAL_METRICS_MUTEX that each of the three tests
locks before running, ensuring sequential execution of:
- test_pragma_checkpoint_stats_and_advisor_surfaces
- test_pragma_checkpoint_autocheckpoint_triggers_and_disable_semantics
- test_pragma_checkpoint_autocheckpoint_bursty_default_vs_adaptive

This prevents flaky assertion failures caused by one test's WAL
metric writes being visible to another test's reads.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
